**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Angle variation: 0° to 30°

*   Overlap: 75% (0.49 mm)
*   Particle density (rho_p): 5600 kg/m³
*   Particle radius (r_p): 0.5 µm
*   CH4 dynamic viscosity (mu_CH4): 20.18 x 10^-6 Pa s
*   characteristic time (to): approximately 0.015 ms
*   Frequency: 1000 Hz
*   Stokes Number: approximately 0.015
*   Uncertainty in Final Velocity Measurement: Less than 2%
